response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and deep systems-level engineering skills, but his resume shows minimal direct exposure to JVM tooling, enterprise Java/Kotlin IDE development, or Spring ecosystem work — core requirements for this role. His Java exposure is listed as a skill but not demonstrated in professional context, and his focus is predominantly on TypeScript, DLang, and web/mobile systems.
strengths: Proven experience building complex developer tooling and IDE-like systems (e.g., NI LabWindows, CI/CD infrastructure)
Strong track record in open-source contributions and technical workshops demonstrating communication and teaching ability
Deep systems-level understanding across languages and platforms, including performance-critical and real-time applications
concerns: No demonstrable professional experience with Java/Kotlin IDE tooling, Spring, or JVM internals
Primary tech stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang; Java appears as a minor skill without project context
Lack of evidence of work on enterprise build tools, application servers, or language server protocol (LSP) systems
